treatment_information.treatment_response: Neurologically intact, full strength and sensation, minimal incisional pain requiring only Tylenol

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented after mechanical fall and underwent evaluation
CT scan revealed C2 fracture with posterior displacement
Underwent C1-2 posterior fusion with allograft
Discharge with instructions including physical therapy

patient_outcome.final_status: Ambulatory - Independent, Mental status clear and coherent
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow-up visit to address clearance to drive and return to work
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient reports no issues and sleeps in recliner for comfort
